title: Research Assistant (12-Month Contract | SGD 3000 - SGD 3100) – JO 27772
description:
Key Highlights:

  • Office Hours: Monday-Friday
  • Nearest MRT: Caldecott Station
  • Be a part of a data-driven team to support frontline programmes with visual insights.

Key Responsibilities:

  • Extract, locate and convert information from structured and unstructured sources (e.g., case notes, reports, session logs, genograms) into predefined structured data fields.
  • Clean and process datasets for analysis using Excel and related tools.
  • Produce visualisations (charts, tables) for operational reporting and stakeholder briefings.
  • Contribute to data-driven process improvements and help identify opportunities to automate/manual workflow efficiencies.
  • Maintain strict confidentiality and comply with data-protection practices when handling sensitive records.
  • Provide general administrative support and ad-hoc data tasks as assigned by the team lead.


Key Requirements:

  • Holder (Bachelor’s Degree)
  • Minimum 1 year relevant experience in data processing, data entry, analytics, or related administrative work.
  • Advanced Excel skills (data cleaning, PivotTables, basic formulae).
  • Experience with Power BI, Tableau, SQL, or Python is advantageous.
  • Strong attention to detail, methodical approach, and ability to work with sensitive information.
  • Good written and spoken English; clear communication and stakeholder engagement skills.
  • Able to work independently and collaboratively in a team environment.


Only shortlisted candidates are notified. Thank you.

By submitting your resume or personal data, you consent to BGC Group Pte Ltd collecting, using, and disclosing your personal data to our clients and partners for the purpose of evaluating your suitability for job opportunities and related recruitment services. You acknowledge that you have read, understood, and agree to our Privacy Policy for Job Applicants, available at https://bgc-group.com/notice-for-job-applicants.

BGC Group Pte Ltd (Outsourcing)

EA 05C3053

postedCompany.description:
BGC Group is an international recruitment and manpower outsourcing firm that identifies and delivers human capital solutions that imperative to every successful company’s growth. 

Having helped 25,000 individuals quickly land rewarding careers in companies that drive industries since our inception in 2005, we believe in developing relationships based on a solid ground of trust between both employers and job-seekers. This is what differentiates us and gives us a competitive edge from the rest. 

Staying true to our vision of Bridging & Growing Careers Because We Care, we are now proudly listed under Omnibridge Holdings on the Hong Kong Stock Exchange (08462:HK) in 2017.
postedCompany.name: BGC GROUP PTE. LTD.
